name: Pop Out Boy!
overview: Han Sun Nyeo found out that she has the same name and the look of a character in a love story cartoon that has been over 10 years. She read that cartoon with curiosity and fell asleep. When she woke up, there is a pop out boy Cheon Nam Wook next to her on the bed. From the moment he popped out of the cartoon, Sun Nyeo's school life goes complicated.

trailers.title: 내 인생에 갑자기 끼어든 미친X [만찢남녀] - TEASER
